column3: The medatada information of mod name/descriptions.

Use your Airbuds (support Spotify, Apple Music, SoundCloud, Deezer, Amazon Music, Audiomack) listening history to quickly search BeatSaver maps!
For better Japanese search results, install the 'Airbuds Search Kakasi' mod.
Forked from Tycho Bellers' original Spotify Search.
Kakasi-based romaji adapter for Airbuds Search.
Spawn a bigger base platform for people with vertigo so they can play comfortably, AntiVertigo v1.0.9
Change any text in the game
beatleader.com | In-game leaderboards for custom and OST maps | Score replays | Clans, events, playlists and much more
A multiplayer private server for the modding community. Supports crossplay between PC and Quest.
Reverts haptic feedback changes without breaking arc and chain notes.
Search and download songs with a lot of filtering and sorting options and without frustration!
Allows you to override the default bomb color
Allows discord rich presence to see which song you're playing, the current time, and much more.
Improvement upon SongBrowser with similiar functionality
Library that parses BeatSaber Markup Language to create UI elements
Removes pitch compensation to make songs go nightcore on different speed
Stops the annoying BTS characters from spawning whilst playing their maps.
Modding library that standardizes the use of GameObject layers and provides tools for easier rendering pipeline modifications
ChatPlex BeatSaber modding SDK (Dependence for other mods)
Turn your Beat Saber into a christmas wonderland!
Displays the time in game. Alternatively also the Battery Percentage
help you to tweaking saber offset easier inside quest
Core mod required for other mods to function!
Lets you play with custom models for sabers, notes, and walls!
Preserves your player data (scores, controller offset, etc) between updates or any other time it might be lost
A Beat Saber Quest mod for displaying stats on Discord
Sets the player age to an adult.
Find your song faster with this mod.
Mod to unlock pc graphics settings on quest beat saber
This mod displays and records your heart rate in the quest game. Supports multiple data sources including Bluetooth, HypeRate, Pulsoid and OSC. Bluetooth permition patch required if you use it.
Changes the scores that pop up when you hit notes
Mod that adds more configurability to hitsounds, and fixes several base game bugs
Expands the song artwork to cover the right side of the level select.

Create images & move them around | .jpg / .png / .gif files are all supported. You can either put them in: ModData/com.beatgames.beatsaber/Mods/Imager/Images or you can use the mod’s download feature!
Skip the intro and outro of maps
Configure your Jump Distance, Speed, and more with ultra precision!
Lapiz makes modders' lives easier by exposing utilities to them cleanly. This mod does nothing on its own.

This adds a host of new things you can do with your maps as a mapper, and allows you to play said maps as a player. An update of the port of the PC original mod by Kyle 1413. Previously maintained by zoller27osu.
Adds a visualizer to the menu
Provides way too many utilities for mod developers
Displays your installed mods inside the game and gives you a warning prompt upon starting the game to tell you if a mod failed to load.
Adds custom songs to Beat Saber Multiplayer.
Port of MultiplayerExtensions, the PC mod that adds extra features to multiplayer
This adds a host of new things you can do with your maps. Original mod for PC by Aeroluna. Contributions by Fern and Sc2ad.
Hides the promo banner on the main screen.
Beat Saber mod for displaying nya-tastic images from various anime themed web APIs!
Lets you tweak individual particle settings! And has rainbow particles!
Loads playlists and provides lots of functionality to other mods.
Download playlists from websites directly in game
Manage all your songs and playlists!
Various improvements to the practice gamemode
Add endlessly customizable counters to your ingame UI!
Allows users to change their sfx sounds and in-game music easily!
Customize the Beat Saber menu, add custom banners and quotes
Adds a button, that picks a random song out of the current list
Adds a history tab that displays the most recently played maps
Changes the color of the health bar according to your health
shows extra information after completing a level
Tweak the default saber and trail
View extra information about your swings
Smoothes your Controller position while in menus to make it less shaky, making the UI easier to use, etc.
Adds songloading, map requirement handling and related utilities to the game.
Access your Spotify playlists and quickly search for matching custom maps!
Don't think there's enough fireworks? This mod adds a variety of settings that can make fireworks powerful enough to explode the game itself!
Animation for Noodle and Chroma. Requires CustomJSONData. Don't delete
Speed up or remove boring transitions in the game
